entries.title: Commentary on numbers 35:28
entries.excerpt: What does it mean that a homicide returns for absolution after the death of the high priest, except that the human race, which brought death upon itself by sinning, receives absolution for its guilt after the death of the true priest, namely, our Redeemer? Exposition of the Old and New Testament, Numbers

entries.title: EXPOSITION OF THE OLD AND NEW TESTAMENT, NUMBERS 24 on numbers 35:28
entries.excerpt: What does it mean that a homicide returns for absolution after the death of the high priest, except that the human race, which brought death upon itself by sinning, receives absolution for its guilt after the death of the true priest, namely, our Redeemer?
